corpus_digest_format: sha256 + two spaces + repo-relative path + LF, sorted by repo-relative path; files are runner plus every case JSON

candidate.source_identity_note: final product/package revision; later control commits change only the exact boundary oracle, tests, and durable launch records
candidate.selection_note: Authorized rebaseline is reused from its first exact final-package input; the remaining thirteen receipts are the first terminals for their exact all-five final inputs.

public_0_2.selection_note: Both receipts are the first terminals for the exact current runner/case inputs on the pinned clean public 0.2 package.

aggregation.method: exact-input reuse of one candidate and two pinned-public terminals plus one thirteen-case final candidate batch
aggregation.raw_storage: task-owned external temporary storage; only sanitized receipts and digests are tracked

known_interrupted_batches.stage: during clean-qualifying-control before a terminal case receipt
known_interrupted_batches.reason: Root stopped immediately after the first boundary taxonomy failure; the passing authorized receipt and failed boundary receipt are retained
